task_prompt: Compare the provided microbial genomes to compute an ANI-style distance matrix, identify the closest genome pair, and summarize all pairwise genome comparisons.
output_requirements: Write the ANI distance matrix CSV at {selected_dir}/output/distance_matrix.csv.
Write the pairwise summary TSV at {selected_dir}/output/summary.tsv.
Write the closest pair text file at {selected_dir}/output/closest_pair.txt.

deliverables.description: Write the ANI distance matrix CSV.
Write the pairwise ANI summary TSV.
Write the closest pair text summary.
